note: Continuation of the BELLVER article (recorded on leaf 160) appears in the first half of this leaf. The new Balearic entry on this leaf is BELLVEURA. BELLVER (v. Lérida) and BELLVEY (Tarragona) are non-Balearic.

entries.title: BELLVEURA
entries.description: Alq. en la isla de Mallorca, prov. de Baleares, part. jud. de Inca, térm. y jurisd. de la v. de Binisalem. (V. Binisalem.)
